prompt: Plan a quality audit for a software project against ISO 9001 requirements.
assertions: defines audit scope aligned with ISO 9001 clauses
creates audit schedule with activities and duration

prompt: Classify 12 audit findings from a process audit.
assertions: provides evidence reference for each finding
assesses systemic vs isolated nature of findings

prompt: 3 major nonconformities found. Design corrective action plan.
assertions: performs root cause analysis for each finding
designs corrective actions addressing root causes
plans verification of corrective action effectiveness

prompt: Follow-up audit to verify corrective actions from previous audit.
assertions: reviews evidence of corrective action implementation
verifies root cause was actually addressed
closes findings with sufficient evidence or escalates
